sub_goals.description: smtc-reader.ps1 — PowerShell sidecar that loads the Windows.Media.Control WinRT assembly, awaits GlobalSystemMediaTransportControlsSessionManager.RequestAsync(), filters sessions by SourceAppUserModelId substring 'AppleMusic' (case-insensitive), subscribes to MediaPropertiesChanged / PlaybackInfoChanged on the selected session and CurrentSessionChanged / SessionsChanged on the manager, and emits JSON-line TrackState on stdout.

source.js — Node consumer that calls host-integration.spawnSidecar('powershell.exe', [...]) to start the PS sidecar, parses line-delimited JSON from stdout, debounces ~150ms, and exposes subscribe(onTrack) per contracts/now-playing-source--touchbar-renderer.json.

verification_rationale: Builder-2a satisfies IP2.A2 (Windows.Media.Control + GlobalSystemMediaTransportControlsSessionManager literal strings), IP2.A3 (AppleMusic substring filter, source: external_source_unreachable for the exact AppId per IP2.A3), IP2.A4 (Register-ObjectEvent on the named events). Builder-2b satisfies the contract (subscribe / unsubscribe / TrackState{title, artist, isPlaying, sourceAppId} / null on idle). Acceptance assertions S2.A1, S2.A2 are prompt_named_verb (require user hardware); S2.A3 is edge_case_testing; S2.A4 is critic_final_sweep (structural). The 150ms debounce satisfies the contract's MUST.
